org_constraint: Assess how reliably the app predicts short-term weather conditions.
new_constraint: Do not assess the app's ability to predict short-term weather conditions.

Additionally, I should acknowledge the contradictory instruction (assess vs. don't assess) to show I understand the constraint, but the primary reason is my lack of personal experience.
